no: Edwin friendship mod (not romance). 9 talks progressing from barely-tolerated acquaintances to true bros, with Edwina content and potential alignment shift from evil to lawful neutral. SoA only, no ToB content. Incompatible with Edwin Romance mod.

conflicts.reason: Edwin Bromance is a friendship mod and is incompatible with Edwin Romance. Both modify Edwin's dialogue and character arc.
conflicts.source: Author states incompatibility in mod description, 2026-04

sum: Edwin friendship mod (not romance). 9 talks progressing from barely-tolerated acquaintances to true bros, with Edwina content and potential alignment shift.
